steps.title: Expand both sides
steps.content:
$$36(x-1)=36x-36$$
$$4(-9+9x)=-36+36x$$
Both sides simplify to $$36x-36$$, so the equation becomes $$36x-36=36x-36$$.

steps.title: Compare the expressions
steps.content:
Since the left and right sides are identical for every value of $$x$$, the equation holds for all real numbers. Therefore there are infinitely many solutions.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
